title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: My analysis tonight - on how both sides have reasons to feel aggrieved.

But it is another case for the prosecution against Keir Starmer, because defence and security was the one area where he was outperforming expect...
